summary: Matched a broad set of very small, mostly 24-byte accessor/setter functions across camera, fighter, game-mode, library, map, and player code. The PR also tightened prototypes, introduced or expanded static headers and inferred structs, corrected rodata typing, and added a tools/fix.py primitive-type conversion mode. There were no review comments in the slice, so intent is inferred from the diff.
what_changed: Implemented multiple camera setters/getters such as Camera_80030740, Camera_80030A60, Camera_80030A8C, Camera_80030AE0, Camera_80030B0C, Camera_80030B38, Camera_80030B64, Camera_80030B90, and Camera_80031074, replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations with typed bool/u8/void signatures.

Matched small Kirby and Yoshi special-N attribute accessors by reading fighter data or gFtDataList ext_attr fields, including ftKb_SpecialN_800F5A60, ftKb_SpecialN_800F5A70, ftKb_SpecialN_800F5A98, ftKb_SpecialN_800F5AC0, ftKb_SpecialN_800F5AD8, ftYs_SpecialN_8012CD10, ftYs_SpecialN_8012CD28, ftYs_SpecialN_8012CD40, ftYs_SpecialN_8012CD58, and ftYs_SpecialN_8012CD70.
Changed Kirby/Purin unknown motion-state getter return types to HSD_JObj* and kept explicit casts from gobj with '@todo What???' comments where the fallback is suspicious.
Matched small fighter/common functions including ftCo_80094138, ft_80085204, ftParts_80074A74, ftPp_SpecialS_8012114C, and ftYs_SpecialS_8012DF00.
Matched game-mode table and state accessors/mutators in gm_1601.c such as gm_80160968, gm_8016400C, gm_80164024, fn_8016419C, fn_801641B4, gm_801641CC, gm_8016A92C, gm_8016B1EC, and fn_8016B388.
Added or refined inferred structs for small matched accesses, including gm_8016A92C_arg0_t, lbl_8046B668_t, mpLib_804D64B8_t, mpLib_804D64C0_t, lbMthp_8001E8F8_t, and pl_800386E8_arg0_t.
Moved static locals/prototypes into new or updated .static.h files for ftCo_Guard, lbaudio_ax, mplib, lbmthp, camera, lbsnap, and gm_1601.

Corrected several prototypes from raw ints or UNK signatures to more specific pointer/primitive types, e.g. ftData_80085E50 returns lbMthp_8001E8F8_t*, mpLib_8004D16C returns mpLib_804D64B8_t*, mpLib_8004D17C returns mpLib_804D64C0_t*, and lbMthp_8001E8F8 takes lbMthp_8001E8F8_t*.
Updated config/GALE01/symbols.txt to mark lbl_803B7930 as float data, enabling typed Vec2/float table usage in gm_1601.
Extended tools/fix.py with a 'prim' mode that converts project primitive typedefs such as s8/u8/s16/u16/s32/u32/f32/f64 into C primitive spellings.
smart_moves: Targeted many tiny accessors/setters: each small match removed a stub while also revealing concrete field types, table shapes, and API signatures.
Used typed static data declarations and STATIC_ASSERTs for inferred structs such as lbl_8046B668_t, mpLib_804D64B8_t, and mpLib_804D64C0_t, reducing ambiguity for future matches.
Moved file-local statics and private prototypes into .static.h files instead of keeping large blocks in .c files, improving include organization and reuse for matching.
Preserved uncertainty with explicit '@todo' comments for suspicious casts and fake-looking matches rather than pretending the recovered structure was fully understood.
Converted raw M2C_FIELD accesses into named fields where confidence was higher, for example ftCo_80094138 writing fp->mv.co.guard.x1C and x10, and camera setters writing cm_80452C68 fields.
Typed rodata as float in symbols.txt before using it as a Vec2 table in gm_1601, aligning symbol metadata with C declarations.
decomp_lessons: Small 24-byte functions are often simple field loads/stores or table indexes; matching them is useful because it forces correct prototypes and unlocks surrounding callers.
When a global pointer table is actually an array of structs, define the pointed-to struct and fix getter return types before matching setters that index into it.
For ext_attr accessors, prefer named fighter data structures when known; otherwise, keep M2C_FIELD offsets and avoid overnaming until the attribute layout is proven.
If a function returns a JObj but falls back to a GObj cast, type the API to the actual return register usage but leave a visible todo for the questionable semantic mismatch.
Moving statics to module .static.h files can help when matching functions need address-ordered globals, private prototypes, or typed BSS/data without polluting public headers.
Changing public headers from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to exact primitive/pointer types is part of the match, not just cleanup; it can be required to reproduce call ABI and codegen.
Symbol data annotations matter: marking rodata as float can support correct float/Vec2 declarations and table indexing codegen.
naming_conventions: Private static headers use address-based include guards like __GALE01_091A2C, __GALE01_02305C, and __GALE01_04D164.
Static/global declarations retain address comments such as /* 452C68 */ static Camera cm_80452C68 and /* 4D64B8 */ static mpLib_804D64B8_t* mpLib_804D64B8.
Inferred struct names follow symbol/function-derived placeholders, e.g. gm_8016A92C_arg0_t, lbl_8046B668_t, mpLib_804D64B8_t, mpLib_804D64C0_t, and lbMthp_8001E8F8_t.
Public function prototypes keep address comments in headers and replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS only when the return and arguments are supported by the matched body.
Unknown fields remain xNN/unk_NN/pad_NN with comments like 'inferred' or 'maybe part of' rather than receiving speculative semantic names.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Matched simple bool/u8 setter functions by directly assigning to bitfield-like members of cm_80452C68.
Matched getter functions by returning table entries from lbl_803B7808, lbl_803B7864, lbl_803B7888, lbl_803B78A4, and lbl_803B7930 with exact element types.
Used gFtDataList[FTKIND_KIRBY] and gFtDataList[0xE] ext_attr reads for tiny fighter attribute-return functions.
Used M2C_FIELD where struct knowledge was still weak, notably for Yoshi copied-ability offsets, Popo special-S state resets, and a marked fake match in mpIsland_8005AC8C.
Introduced small padded structs with exact sizes and STATIC_ASSERTs to make pointer arithmetic and indexed stores match without overdefining unknown regions.
Adjusted function argument types to signedness/width-sensitive primitives such as u8, u16, s8, s16, ssize_t, int, and bool to match ABI/codegen.
Added tools/fix.py 'prim' action to mechanically rewrite typedef primitives to compiler-preferred primitive spellings, suggesting type spelling affected matching in some cases.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that replace M2C_FIELD offsets in ftKb_SpecialNYs_801092DC through ftKb_SpecialNYs_8010933C with named Yoshi/Kirby attribute fields.
Find follow-up work on the '@todo What???' HSD_JObj* fallback in ftKb_Init_UnkMotionStates6 and ftPr_Init_UnkMotionStates6.
Search for later refinements of mpIsland_8005AC8C marked 'Very fake match'.
Search for later PRs expanding mpLib_804D64B8_t and mpLib_804D64C0_t field names.
Search for uses of tools/fix.py prim in subsequent matching PRs.
